posts.author: iruser (iruser)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am liking the dashboard Widget Board Updates. I think i would love it if i could restrict it to certain Groups of to certain actions (names to use the monday field name).

Use case. My AR Dashboard restricts to actions in the AR Group. My AP Dashboard likewise to the AP Group. I would love for these dashboards to only see the Board Updates from those sections (groups) of my board.

Am i missing something that i can’t add filters to this Widget as you can pretty much any widget?
